absorption: Sellers are hitting the bid at VAL (e.g., 32 sells at 63200), but price is not breaking down, indicating buyers are absorbing the selling pressure.
dom_observation: Significant ask walls above (e.g., 131 at 63220, 134 at 63230) could act as initial resistance/targets. Bids below (e.g., 40 at 63180) provide underlying support.
reason: Price is holding at the critical support level VAL despite persistent negative delta and falling CVD, indicating strong absorption by buyers.
should_reason: Fiyat, güçlü satış baskısına rağmen VAL seviyesinin altına düşmeliydi ancak düşmüyor, bu da alıcıların absorpsiyonunu ve potansiyel bir geri dönüşü işaret ediyor.
